text:

Log:
  - Add WWW
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:08 2014	(r355385)
+++ head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:13 2014	(r355386)
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:ABIGAIL
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Shuffle a list
 
 LICENSE=	MIT

Modified: head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/pkg-descr	Mon May 26 15:34:08 2014	(r355385)
+++ head/devel/p5-Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/pkg-descr	Mon May 26 15:34:13 2014	(r355386)
@@ -11,3 +11,5 @@ linear extra memory is used.
 
 The algorithm used is discussed by Knuth [3]. It was first published
 by Fisher and Yates [2], and later by Durstenfeld [1].
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Algorithm-Numerical-Shuffle/
